pom.xml.general_idea: Update the primary Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17 semantics, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compliance.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source level to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler will reject JDK 21-specific language features if the source level remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler target level to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The generated bytecode will be incompatible with JDK 21 runtime expectations or fail to use JDK 21 class file features if the target remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin version to a snapshot compatible with newer toolchains.

src/test/java/SmartHome/controller/AddSe.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.
